spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-12 for containers) to isolate focus.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: MODE A: TETRIS GRID (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, gap-8)
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: CONTROL ROOM GRID (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4, gap-4)
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: max 8px (rounded-md). Crisp, tactical edges. No overly soft curves.

surface_strategies.marketing_hero: Dark Obsidian background with subtle grid overlay. Heavy typography.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#141414), 1px solid border (border-white/10), no shadows. Hover: -translate-y-1, border-white/25.
surface_strategies.navigation: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10.

components.buttons: Sharp edges, 1px inner glow. Primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 hover:border-white/30 text-white.
components.forms: Shadcn highly customized. Inputs: bg-black border-white/10 text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-sm.
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts using Volt Blue and Electric Blaze on dark transparent backgrounds.
components.3d_visualizer: Use React Three Fiber (@react-three/fiber) + Drei (@react-three/drei). Dark background environment, glowing neon blue/green geometric nodes (meshStandardMaterial with emissive properties).

animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion, subtle opacity and y-axis slide (20px).
animations.scrolling: Lenis for smooth scrolling on marketing pages.
animations.micro_interactions: Hover states on all cards and buttons. Fast, crisp transitions (0.15s ease-in-out).

icons.library: lucide-react for UI icons, @icons-pack/react-simple-icons for company logos (Google, Meta, Amazon, etc.).

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D render of glowing neural networks and data structures. Use for Landing Page hero background.
hero_background.overlay: bg-black/50 to bg-gradient-to-r from-black/90 via-black/60 to-transparent for text readability.

ai_interviewer.description: Sleek, futuristic AI avatar portrait. Use for the AI Interviewer persona in the interview simulation view.

coding_context.description: Silhouette of a programmer coding in a dark room. Use for "Proctoring" or "Intense Focus" section backgrounds.

special_features_instructions.3d_data_structures: Render binary trees and graphs using @react-three/fiber. Use Line/QuadraticBezierLine for edges and Sphere for nodes. Highlight active nodes by changing emissive color.
special_features_instructions.proctoring_ui: Show a persistent 'Proctoring Active' pill in the header with a pulsing red or green dot. Use browser Page Visibility API to detect tab switches and log them.
special_features_instructions.problem_bank_table: Dense data table using Control Room Grid strategy. Columns: Status, Title, Pattern (tag), Difficulty (colored pill), Company (logo icon).
special_features_instructions.ai_chat_interface: Split pane view: Left side is code editor, Right side is AI chat. Terminal retro-futurism vibe.
